'''Kōsanrei Shrine''' (皇産霊神社, also read Mimusubi Shrine or Kōsarei Shrine) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}} in {{ill|Japan|ja|日本}}.
These shrines primarily enshrine {{ill|Kami-musubi-no-Kami|ja|神皇産霊神}}.
* {{ill|Kōsanrei Shrine (Tōgane City, Konumata)|ja|皇産靈神社 (東金市小沼田)}} - Located in {{ill|Konumata|ja|小沼田}}, {{ill|Tōgane City|ja|東金市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}}. * {{ill|Kōsanrei Shrine (Tōgane City, Ōnumata)|ja|皇産靈神社 (東金市大沼田)}} - Located in Ōnumata, Tōgane City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yui Kōsanrei Shrine|ja|油井皇産霊神社}} - Located in {{ill|Yui|ja|油井}}, Tōgane City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Kōsanrei Shrine (Sakura City)|ja|皇産霊神社 (佐倉市)}} - Located in {{ill|Uchida|ja|内田}}, {{ill|Sakura City|ja|佐倉市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Kōsanrei Shrine (Yachiyo City)|ja|皇産霊神社 (八千代市)}} - Located in {{ill|Shimomarket|ja|下市場}}, {{ill|Yachiyo City|ja|八千代市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Kōsanrei Shrine (Yotsukaidō City)|ja|皇産霊神社 (四街道市)}} - Located in {{ill|Yotsukaidō City|ja|四街道市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Kōsanrei Shrine (Kujūkuri Town)|ja|皇産靈神社 (九十九里町)}} - Located in {{ill|Kujūkuri Town|ja|九十九里町}}, Chiba Prefecture. * Kōsanrei Shrine - Located in Hatake, {{ill|Kannami Town|ja|函南町}}, {{ill|Tagata District|ja|田方郡}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|ja|静岡県}}. * Kōsanrei Shrine - Located in {{ill|Oshino|ja|押野}}, {{ill|Nonoichi City|ja|野々市市}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|ja|石川県}}. Also known as {{ill|Takakōsanrei Shrine|ja|高皇産霊神社}}. * {{ill|Kōsanrei Shrine (Amagasaki City)|ja|皇産霊神社 (尼崎市)}} - Located in {{ill|Amagasaki City|ja|尼崎市}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|ja|兵庫県}}. * {{ill|Kōsanrei Shrine (Kitakyūshū City)|ja|皇産霊神社 (北九州市)}} - Located in {{ill|Moji Ward|ja|門司区}}, {{ill|Kitakyūshū City|ja|北九州市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}.

These shrines primarily enshrine {{ill|Kami-musubi-no-Kami|ja|神皇産霊神}}.
* {{ill|Kōsanrei Shrine (Tōgane City, Konumata)|ja|皇産靈神社 (東金市小沼田)}} - Located in {{ill|Konumata|ja|小沼田}}, {{ill|Tōgane City|ja|東金市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}}. * {{ill|Kōsanrei Shrine (Tōgane City, Ōnumata)|ja|皇産靈神社 (東金市大沼田)}} - Located in Ōnumata, Tōgane City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yui Kōsanrei Shrine|ja|油井皇産霊神社}} - Located in {{ill|Yui|ja|油井}}, Tōgane City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Kōsanrei Shrine (Sakura City)|ja|皇産霊神社 (佐倉市)}} - Located in {{ill|Uchida|ja|内田}}, {{ill|Sakura City|ja|佐倉市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Kōsanrei Shrine (Yachiyo City)|ja|皇産霊神社 (八千代市)}} - Located in {{ill|Shimomarket|ja|下市場}}, {{ill|Yachiyo City|ja|八千代市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Kōsanrei Shrine (Yotsukaidō City)|ja|皇産霊神社 (四街道市)}} - Located in {{ill|Yotsukaidō City|ja|四街道市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Kōsanrei Shrine (Kujūkuri Town)|ja|皇産靈神社 (九十九里町)}} - Located in {{ill|Kujūkuri Town|ja|九十九里町}}, Chiba Prefecture. * Kōsanrei Shrine - Located in Hatake, {{ill|Kannami Town|ja|函南町}}, {{ill|Tagata District|ja|田方郡}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|ja|静岡県}}. * Kōsanrei Shrine - Located in {{ill|Oshino|ja|押野}}, {{ill|Nonoichi City|ja|野々市市}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|ja|石川県}}. Also known as {{ill|Takakōsanrei Shrine|ja|高皇産霊神社}}. * {{ill|Kōsanrei Shrine (Amagasaki City)|ja|皇産霊神社 (尼崎市)}} - Located in {{ill|Amagasaki City|ja|尼崎市}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|ja|兵庫県}}. * {{ill|Kōsanrei Shrine (Kitakyūshū City)|ja|皇産霊神社 (北九州市)}} - Located in {{ill|Moji Ward|ja|門司区}}, {{ill|Kitakyūshū City|ja|北九州市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}.
{{Disambiguation}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kōsanrei Shrine}} [[Category:Shrines with identical names]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:Kōsanrei Shrine]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[simple:user:immanuelle/Kōsanrei Shrine]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:Kōsanrei Shrine]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:dd]] [[Category:Kōsanrei Shrine]] [[Category:dd]] [[Category:mass bump]] [[ja:皇産霊神社]]

21 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:皇産霊神社 up to rev 94007849
revision.text:
'''皇産霊神社'''（みむすびじんじゃ、'''皇産靈神社'''）は[[日本]]の[[神社]]。各地に鎮座する。
主に[[神皇産霊神]]を主祭している。
*[[皇産靈神社 (東金市小沼田)]] - [[千葉県]][[東金市]]小沼田鎮座 *[[皇産靈神社 (東金市大沼田)]] - 千葉県東金市大沼田鎮座 *[[油井皇産霊神社]] - 千葉県東金市油井鎮座 *[[皇産霊神社 (佐倉市)]] - 千葉県[[佐倉市]][[内田]]鎮座 *[[皇産霊神社 (八千代市)]] - 千葉県[[八千代市]]下市場鎮座 *[[皇産霊神社 (四街道市)]] - 千葉県[[四街道市]]鎮座 *[[皇産靈神社 (九十九里町)]] - 千葉県[[九十九里町]]鎮座 *皇産靈神社 [[静岡県]]田方郡[[函南町]]畑鎮座 *皇産霊神社[[高皇産霊神社 (野々市市)]] - [[石川県]][[野々市市]]押野鎮座 *[[皇産霊神社 (尼崎市)]] - [[兵庫県]][[尼崎市]]鎮座 *[[皇産霊神社 (北九州市)]] - [[福岡県]][[北九州市]][[門司区]]鎮座
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{DEFAULTSORT:こうさんれいしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

Located in {{ill|Uchida|ja|内田|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uchida|qq=|1=Uchida|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2472874}}, [[:en:Sakura, Chiba|Sakura City]], Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Musubi Shrine (Yachiyo City)|ja|皇産霊神社 (八千代市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musubi Shrine (Yachiyo City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Kujūkuri|Kujūkuri Town]], Chiba Prefecture. * Musubi Shrine - Located in Hatake, [[:en:Kannami|Kannami Town]], [[:en:Tagata District, Shizuoka|Tagata District]], [[:en:Shizuoka Prefecture|Shizuoka Prefecture]]. * Musubi Shrine - Located in {{ill|Oshino|ja|押野|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oshino|qq=|1=Oshino|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q23997230}}, [[:en:Nonoichi, Ishikawa|Nonoichi City]], [[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]]. <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:皇産霊神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:皇産霊神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:皇産霊神社]]
'''Musubi Shrine''' (皇産霊神社, also read Mimusubi Shrine or Kōsarei Shrine) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrines|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|qid=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}}.
These shrines primarily enshrine {{ill|Kami-musubi-no-Kami|ja|神皇産霊神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-musubi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to カミムスビ|1=Kamimusubi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3275901}}.
* {{ill|Musubi Shrine (Tōgane City, Konumata)|ja|皇産靈神社 (東金市小沼田)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musubi Shrine (Tōgane City, Konumata)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in {{ill|Konumata|ja|小沼田|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konumata|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Tōgane|en|Tōgane|qid=Q637913|lt=Tōgane City|1=Tōgane}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|qid=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture|1=Chiba Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Musubi Shrine (Tōgane City, Ōnumata)|ja|皇産靈神社 (東金市大沼田)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musubi Shrine (Tōgane City, Ōnumata)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Ōnumata, Tōgane City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yui Musubi Shrine|ja|油井皇産霊神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yui Musubi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in {{ill|Oil well|en|Oil well|qid=Q587682|lt=Yui|1=Oil well}}, Tōgane City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Musubi Shrine (Sakura City)|ja|皇産霊神社 (佐倉市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musubi Shrine (Sakura City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in {{ill|Uchida|ja|内田|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uchida|1=Uchida|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q2472874}}, {{ill|Sakura, Chiba|en|Sakura, Chiba|qid=Q498011|lt=Sakura City|1=Sakura, Chiba}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Musubi Shrine (Yachiyo City)|ja|皇産霊神社 (八千代市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musubi Shrine (Yachiyo City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in {{ill|Shimomarket|ja|下市場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimomarket|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yachiyo, Chiba|en|Yachiyo, Chiba|qid=Q328651|lt=Yachiyo City|1=Yachiyo, Chiba}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Musubi Shrine (Yotsukaidō City)|ja|皇産霊神社 (四街道市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musubi Shrine (Yotsukaidō City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in {{ill|Yotsukaidō|en|Yotsukaidō|qid=Q429373|lt=Yotsukaidō City|1=Yotsukaidō}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Musubi Shrine (Kujūkuri Town)|ja|皇産靈神社 (九十九里町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musubi Shrine (Kujūkuri Town)|1=Kōsanrei Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11581081}} - Located in {{ill|Kujūkuri|en|Kujūkuri|qid=Q1202775|lt=Kujūkuri Town|1=Kujūkuri}}, Chiba Prefecture. * Musubi Shrine - Located in Hatake, {{ill|Kannami|en|Kannami|qid=Q1203533|lt=Kannami Town|1=Kannami}}, {{ill|Tagata District, Shizuoka|en|Tagata District, Shizuoka|qid=Q1154841|lt=Tagata District|1=Tagata District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|qid=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}. * Musubi Shrine - Located in {{ill|Oshino|ja|押野|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oshino|1=Q23997230|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q23997230}}, {{ill|Nonoichi, Ishikawa|en|Nonoichi, Ishikawa|qid=Q1354896|lt=Nonoichi City|1=Nonoichi, Ishikawa}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|en|Ishikawa Prefecture|qid=Q131281|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|1=Ishikawa Prefecture}}. Also known as {{ill|Takakōsanrei Shrine|ja|高皇産霊神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takakōsanrei Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高皇産霊神社 (野々市市)|1=Takamimusuhi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17209339}}. * {{ill|Musubi Shrine (Amagasaki City)|ja|皇産霊神社 (尼崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musubi Shrine (Amagasaki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in {{ill|Amagasaki|en|Amagasaki|qid=Q213318|lt=Amagasaki City|1=Amagasaki}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Musubi Shrine (Kitakyūshū City)|ja|皇産霊神社 (北九州市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musubi Shrine (Kitakyūshū City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in {{ill|Moji-ku, Kitakyūshū|en|Moji-ku, Kitakyūshū|qid=Q1045113|lt=Moji Ward|1=Moji-ku, Kitakyūshū}}, {{ill|Kitakyushu|en|Kitakyushu|qid=Q188806|lt=Kitakyūshū City|1=Kitakyushu}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|qid=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture|1=Fukuoka Prefecture}}.
{{disambiguation}}
